description_long: This is a large, rustic cabin set on a triangular grassy plot, featuring a complex, multi-gabled roof with deep overhangs and exposed wooden beams. The exterior walls are constructed from timber logs or planks, giving the structure a warm, natural appearance. Multiple large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front of the cabin showcases a prominent covered porch supported by thick wooden columns, providing a welcoming entryway. The roof is steeply pitched with several intersecting sections, and the overall footprint of the building is irregular, adapting to the shape of the plot. The cabin exudes a craftsman or lodge-style aesthetic, blending harmoniously with its green surroundings.
description: A large, rustic timber cabin with a multi-gabled roof, exposed beams, and a prominent covered porch, set on a grassy triangular plot. The structure features asymmetrical window placement and a craftsman lodge-style design.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front and left sides of the cabin, showcasing the covered porch, main entrance, and the complex roof structure.
description_view_1: The left side of the cabin is visible, with a long wall, several windows, and the depth of the roof overhangs.
description_view_2: The rear and part of the right side are shown, revealing additional gables, windows, and the irregular footprint of the building.
description_view_3: The right side and a portion of the rear are visible, with more windows and the continuation of the roof's intricate design.
attribute_roof_type: Complex multi-gabled roof with steep pitches, deep overhangs, and intersecting sections, likely covered with dark shingles.
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large and medium-sized rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically across all visible facades, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually.
attribute_door_placement: A single main entrance door is centered on the front facade beneath the covered porch; no other exterior doors are visible.
